cta_description: Join the elite athletes using the most connected AI platform on the market.
f1_desc: We don't just import data; we correlate it. By combining your Garmin workout files with sleep and recovery metrics from Oura or WHOOP, our AI adjusts your training recommendations in real-time.
f1_ui_insight_text: High recovery detected from Oura. Recommended intensity increased by +5%.
f2_desc: Stop manually typing power targets into your bike computer. Our AI model generates structured files that sync directly to your Intervals.icu calendar.
fitbit_desc: Track daily activity, sleep, and nutrition history.
garmin_desc: Direct integration for health and activity data.
hero_desc: Connect your favorite devices and platforms. We handle the data, you handle the training.
hevy_desc: Strength training and workout logging analysis.
intervals_desc: Deep-dive power analytics and seasonal planning.
meta_description: Connect your favorite devices and platforms. We handle the data, you handle the training.
oura_desc: Monitor readiness and sleep cycles automatically.
polar_desc: Activities, sleep, and nightly recharge data.
rouvy_desc: Analyze your virtual races with outdoor precision.
strava_desc: Auto-upload activities and sync your segments.
telegram_desc: Chat with your AI Coach on the go via Telegram Bot.
wahoo_desc: Sync activities and training plans with your ELEMNT.
whoop_desc: Incorporate recovery and sleep scores into your training.
withings_desc: Weight, body composition, and health metrics.
yazio_desc: Nutrition tracking and meal planning integration.
